title: Principal Manager, Communications and Digital Marketing
description:
As Communications team lead, you will shape and drive Lifelong Learning Singapore (LLSG) strategic narrative to position the organisation as a national catalyst for lifelong learning. You will lead the development of integrated marketing and communications strategies and deepen engagement across individuals, enterprises, and partners. This is a leadership role that demands both strategic foresight and operational excellence. You will steward LLSG’s brand, voice and outreach efforts across digital, media, and stakeholder channels, ensuring that LLSG’s programmes, advisory services, and initiatives are not only visible but valued.

Your primary responsibilities include the following:

· Craft and evolve LLSG’s strategic messaging to reinforce its role as a trusted enabler of lifelong learning and skills development in Singapore.

· Lead the design and delivery of integrated, multi-channel marketing and outreach strategies that align with organisational goals and audience needs.

· Drive brand visibility and develop messaging frameworks, ensuring consistent narratives across digital, social, EDMs, media, and events.

· Drive audience-targeted campaigns (individuals, enterprises, partners) using Search Engine Optimisation (SEO) / Search Engine Marketing (SEM), social media, and paid/organic outreach.

· Establish KPIs and measurement frameworks to track and analyse campaign performance, using insights to improve engagement, visibility, and conversions.

· Partner with internal teams and external agencies to amplify LLSG’s programmes and ensure effective execution.

· Lead, coach, and develop a team, ensuring accountability and high-quality delivery across branding, digital, and content.

· Monitor emerging trends in communications, digital engagement, and public sentiment to proactively shape LLSG’s outreach strategies and future-proof its brand positioning.

· Experiment with new formats (e.g., podcasts, webinars, interactive content, community activations) to deepen engagement and expand reach across diverse audience segments.

· Strengthen internal communications to build organisational culture, align teams around strategic priorities, and foster employee advocacy.

· Any other responsibilities deemed important to support the overall efforts of LLSG.

Requirements

· Has strong skills/competencies in communications, marketing and business. This should be demonstrated through candidates’ portfolio.

· At least 8–10 years of relevant work experience in strategic communications, marketing, or brand management, ideally in public sector or complex stakeholder environments.

· Strong command of spoken and written English, with proven ability to craft persuasive messages for diverse audiences.

· Experience in digital marketing, content strategy, branding, and campaign analytics.

· Data-driven, with strong analytical and problem-solving skills to evaluate campaign effectiveness.

· Strategic thinker able to balance big-picture goals with hands-on execution.

· Collaborative, adaptable, and resilient to change, with strong stakeholder management skills.

· Proven leadership skills, able to inspire, guide, and grow a communications team.


Candidates who do not have the required qualification or relevant experience are welcome to apply.

Successful candidates will be offered a 2-year contract in the first instance and may be considered for an extension or be placed on a permanent tenure.

Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
Lifelong Learning Singapore (LLSG) is a national hub dedicated to advancing adult education and workforce development. Formerly known as the Lifelong Learning Institute (LLI), LLSG continues to champion a culture of continuous learning by offering accessible, high-quality upskilling opportunities.

As a key initiative under SkillsFuture Singapore (SSG), LLSG supports individuals in navigating career transitions, empowers employers to build future-ready teams, and collaborates with training providers to deliver innovative, industry-relevant programmes. Strategically located in Paya Lebar, LLSG serves as a vibrant learning ecosystem where people and ideas connect to shape a resilient, adaptable workforce for tomorrow.
postedCompany.name: LIFELONG LEARNING SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
